servinfosub.title: Description
servinfosub.ptxt: BCM monitors conditions of system components and its circuit when ignition is in ON. When an abnormality in the system occurs, BCM performs controls as follows.

servinfosub.title: Self-Diagnosis Function
servinfosub.ptxt: When an abnormality in the system occurs, the area where that abnormality lies is stored in the memory of EEPROM in BCM.

servinfosub.title: Fail-Safe Control
servinfosub.ptxt: When DTC is detected, BCM enters fail-safe mode as long as malfunction continues, but that mode is canceled when BCM recovers normal condition.
